description: A business built around bringing together people with a shared goal, identity, interest, or challenge through membership, events, accountability, or curated interaction.
best_for: Users who are comfortable facilitating interaction
Users who understand a specific group's recurring needs
Users who can build trust and consistency over time
bad_for: Users who dislike ongoing engagement responsibilities
Users who expect immediate monetization without trust-building
revenue_models: upsell to services or digital products
mvp_examples: A small pilot group with 5 to 10 members
evaluation_points: Does the target group have a reason to return repeatedly?
Is the value created by interaction, structure, or access?
Can a small pilot group be formed without large overhead?
starter_next_steps: Define what repeat value the group offers
Run a small pilot community experiment
Measure retention and participation before expanding
